news.t: Underrated Downside Protection ETF RUNN Nears Key Milestone

holdings.infoBox: RUNN is an equity ETF with a total of 57 individual holdings. The top holdings are nVent Electric stock at 2.30%, State Street Sweep at 2.22%, FTI Consulting at 2.15%, Saia, Inc. at 2.15%, and Alphabet at 2.12%.

overview.description: The Running Oak Efficient Growth ETF (RUNN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to invest in large- and mid-cap US stocks through a value and growth approach with a focus on downside volatility management. RUNN was launched on Jun 7, 2023 and is issued by ROC.

data.title: Underrated Downside Protection ETF RUNN Nears Key Milestone
data.text: The ETF industry includes a wide range of funds and firms. From the largest asset managers to the newest operations, issuers have launched funds offering increasingly innovative options to investors.
